overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-drenched cyberpunk city at night, featuring towering skyscrapers with digital billboards, a golden dolphin statue, narrow alleys with vending machines, and ending with entering an elevator. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with vibrant neon lighting and futuristic architecture reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway between cyberpunk skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated walkway, looking up at towering skyscrapers adorned with neon signage

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades rising vertically on all sides
large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful animated content
black metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
connecting walkways and pipes spanning between buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete walkway surrounded by massive cyberpunk skyscrapers adorned with bright digital billboards and neon signs. The camera looks up at the towering structures as artificial light mixes with ambient glow from the city below.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with monumental statue and large advertisements

events.description: turning left from the open walkway into a more enclosed plaza area with large billboards
approaching and circling the large golden dolphin statue

agents.ego_description: turning left to navigate around a plaza area, passing a prominent billboard and approaching a golden statue

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard with pink neon text reading WET DREAM
tall sculptural monument featuring two golden dolphins leaping upward
vertical crimson banner with yellow circular symbols and geometric patterns
large cylindrical columns with green metallic wrapping and horizontal bands

segments.scene_description: Turning left into a semi-enclosed plaza featuring a prominent WET DREAM billboard and a striking golden dolphin statue. The environment shifts from open sky to a more sheltered space with decorative banners and massive structural columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alley with vending machines and planters

events.description: ascending stairs into a narrow alleyway with intense pink and green neon lighting
environment becomes dominated by vibrant colored neon signs and reflections

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs and proceeding through a narrow alley illuminated by vibrant neon signs and lined with palm trees

entered.detail: flight of concrete steps leading upward into the alley
tropical trees in rectangular planters with integrated lighting
illuminated beverage and snack dispensers with glowing interfaces
various pink and green neon signs including circular logos and text

segments.scene_description: Ascending stairs into a narrow cyberpunk alleyway illuminated by intense pink and green neon lights. The path features palm trees in illuminated planters, vending machines, and glowing digital posters on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with metal shutters and utility lighting

events.description: entering a darker corridor with reduced ambient light and sparse green neon
approaching the gated elevator at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit corridor toward an elevator, passing closed metal shutters and debris

entered.detail: closed corrugated metal security gates covering storefronts
green illuminated signs with Asian characters indicating exits
gated elevator shaft with metal accordion doors and overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: Proceeding through a dark, enclosed corridor lined with metal security shutters and illuminated by sparse green neon exit signs. The camera moves toward a gated elevator at the corridor's end, passing scattered debris and closed storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator interior with red padded walls

events.description: entering the elevator with distinctive red interior walls and metal handrails
turning to face the elevator control panel with illuminated floor buttons

agents.ego_description: entering the elevator and turning to face the control panel to select a destination floor

entered.detail: red padded walls with vertical metal strips and horizontal handrails
illuminated interface showing floor options for MARKET and STREET with directional arrows

segments.scene_description: Entering a small elevator with distinctive red padded walls and metal handrails. The camera turns to face the illuminated control panel showing floor options for MARKET and STREET, with the metal gate closing behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the open, towering heights of a neon metropolis into the claustrophobic confines of a service elevator. It begins on an elevated concrete walkway, gazing up at massive skyscrapers draped in glowing digital billboards and artificial light. As the camera turns left, the open sky gives way to a sheltered plaza dominated by a golden dolphin statue and a prominent WET DREAM sign. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends stairs into a narrow alleyway saturated with pink and green neon, passing illuminated palm trees and vending machines before entering a dark, enclosed corridor lined with metal security shutters. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera passes through a gated entrance into a small elevator with red padded walls, turning toward a control panel as the metal gate closes.
